content: Patient selection criteria: For T2DM - preferred in patients with established ASCVD, heart failure, CKD, or those needing weight loss; HbA1c reduction 1-1.5% expected. For obesity - BMI ≥30 or ≥27 with comorbidities; weight loss expectations: liraglutide ~5-8%, semaglutide 2.4mg ~15% (STEP trials). Baseline assessment before initiation: renal function, liver enzymes, history of pancreatitis, personal/family history of MTC/MEN2, pregnancy status. Contraindications absolute: history of MTC, MEN2, pregnancy. Relative contraindications: severe gastroparesis, prior pancreatitis, severe renal impairment. Monitoring: glycemic control (HbA1c every 3 months), weight trajectory, renal function periodically, symptoms of pancreatitis (severe abdominal pain), gallbladder symptoms. Discontinue if <5% weight loss after 12 weeks on maintenance obesity dose (liraglutide) or <5% after 16 weeks (semaglutide 2.4mg).
